title: Fig. 3 in Protocol Optimization For Genomic Dna Extraction And Rapd-Pcr Of Alien Ponto-Caspian Amphipod Pontogammarus Robustoides
author: Brakovska, Aija
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. RAPD fingerprints results from different samples of Pontogammarus robustoides with primers OPA-02 (M- marker, 1-15 runners- different samples of Pontogammarus robustoides; K- control) using RAPD-PCR 10 × Taq buffer with (NH4)2SO4.
